title: TVCraft: Legend of Tenna
description: Adds in a Tenna Companion from Deltarune
body:
**Welcome to TvCraft**

It's TV Time in YOUR Minecraft world!

Coming straight from your house: this mod adds a Tenna companion. Costing only 5 levels, you can summon Tenna into your world. He will fiercely protect you with his life.


How to Use This Mod

- Type "It's TV Time!" into the chat to summon Tenna. It will cost you 5 XP levels!
- Type "Now's your chance to be a [Big Shot]!" in chat to summon Spamton. It will cost you 5 XP levels!
- Build Neo by uploading Spamton to a Floppy Disc, transferring him into a Cyber Core, and building a Neo Golem.
- Stay in place so they can imprint on you! Should you run away, you can tame Tenna with redstone dust and Spamton/Neo with diamonds, emeralds, or gold ingots.
- Use a stick to command them to stay or follow. Use bamboo to command him to wander.

_Feature Presentation_

**Tenna**

- Tenna can be pet with an empty hand, resulting in a texture change
- Tenna bows upon killing monsters or players
- Saying "I love TV" = 10% chance of Tenna giving you a disc. (3 available)
- He dances every few minutes
- His expressions change depending on his status   

            Black Screen: HP Low (<55)
            Signal Error: HP Critically low (<20) OR he's dead
            Grin: Aggressive/Targeting
            Flower: Flattered
            
**Spamton**

- Spamton can be pet with an empty hand, resulting in a texture change
- Spamton has 2 attacks, a melee slap and a ranged pipis
- Pipis have a 4% chance to spawn a baby Spamton
- He glitches every few minutes
- Feeding him an emerald once tamed = 50% chance to drop a disc
- He will sway if you hold gold, emeralds, or diamonds in front of him.

His expressions change depending on his status 

     Red: Aggressive
     Cross Eyed: Flattered
     Monochrome Dealmakers: HP Low (<55)
     Looking Straight Ahead: Gawking at Tenna

    
    
 Spamton can spawn with the following "moods.":


- Hates Tenna: Enters the world with an aura of black hearts. Will insult any Tenna within a 10 block radius, owned by you or otherwise. To bribe him to shut up, feed him a diamond. (32% chance)
- Likes Tenna: Enters the world with an aura of red hearts. Will gawk at and follow any Tenna within a 10 block radius, unless you command him to follow or he becomes aggressive. (31% chance)
- Loves Tenna: Enters the world with a massive aura of red hearts. Will ride on the head of any tamed Tenna, whether it's yours or not. They become "soul-bound" at this point and will no longer obey you. But they will still protect you! (5% chance)
- Indifferent: Nothing special happens (32% chance)

Spamton Neo

Neo can be pet with an empty hand, resulting in a texture change
Neo has 4 attacks: a melee slap, ranged pipis, summoning TNT dropping HealDeals/Spamlings, and a heart-shaped object
Pipis have a 4% chance to spawn a baby Spamton
He glitches every few minutes
Must be built with a cyber core, yellow and magenta terracotta, quartz block, and a carved pumpkin
Healdeals/Spamlings can be tamed with cake. They will not follow you, but right-clicking one can heal you.

![Neo Golem](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a05d7354fe35f62e027beb2203526b8642d17d6b.png)

The pumpkin must be placed last! To transfer Spamton, upload a tamed Spamton into the floppy disc and then right-click the core with the filled disc. 

 

His expressions change depending on his status 

   Cannon Visible: Aggressive
   Cross Eyed: Flattered
   Monochrome Dealmakers: HP Low (<55)
   Heart Showing: Gawking at Tenna

Neo's Moods:

Hates Tenna: Enters the world with an aura of black hearts. Will insult any Tenna within a 10 block radius, owned by you or otherwise. You cannot shut him up. (35% chance)

Loves Tenna: Enters the world with an aura of red hearts. Will gawk at and follow any Tenna within a 10 block radius, unless you command him to follow or he becomes aggressive. (25% chance)

Indifferent: Nothing special happens (40% chance)

 

 Notes

     1. Has yet to be tested in multiplayer. There may be bugs. Please let me know if you notice any.

     2. This is just a hobby. I made the mod as a joke; it's nothing serious. You can make suggestions if you want, though.

    3. Geckolib is required

    4. There's a glitch where sit/wander commands stop registering upon blocking with a shield. If you used a shield in the off hand before this happened, you can shoot an arrow or put the shield into your main hand, block once, then put it back in your inventory.
    
    5. They can be crafted
